text.name: cs_hud_first_run
text.text: Crop Moisture Monitor is now active. Press Shift+M to toggle the field status panel.

text.name: cs_alert_critical
text.text: Field %d: %s at drought stress threshold — irrigate NOW!

text.name: cs_favor_soil_sample
text.text: Take a soil sample from Field %d

text.name: cs_favor_irr_check
text.text: Inspect the irrigation system near Field %d

text.name: cs_irr_no_covered_fields
text.text: No fields covered by this system.

text.name: cs_rec_urgent
text.text: URGENT: Field %d at %.0f%% moisture — irrigate immediately!

text.name: cs_rec_warning
text.text: Field %d at %.0f%% moisture — irrigation recommended within 24h.

text.name: cs_rec_ok
text.text: All fields within acceptable moisture range.

text.name: cs_rec_no_systems
text.text: No irrigation systems are currently active.

text.name: cs_pf_moisture_overlay_desc
text.text: Displays current soil moisture levels across your fields. Red indicates dry soil, green indicates optimal moisture, and blue indicates saturated soil.

text.name: cs_settings_enabled_long
text.text: Toggle the entire Seasonal Crop Stress system on or off

text.name: cs_settings_difficulty_long
text.text: Adjust stress accumulation and evapotranspiration rates

text.name: cs_settings_hud_long
text.text: Show or hide the moisture overlay on the field list

text.name: cs_settings_evap_long
text.text: Base rate of moisture loss from soil

text.name: cs_settings_yield_loss_long
text.text: Maximum percentage of yield that can be lost to drought stress

text.name: cs_settings_threshold_long
text.text: Moisture level below which stress accumulates

text.name: cs_settings_irr_costs_long
text.text: Enable or disable financial costs for running irrigation systems

text.name: cs_settings_alerts_long
text.text: Show warning notifications when fields need water

text.name: cs_settings_cooldown_long
text.text: Minimum hours between alerts for the same field

text.name: helpLine_cs_p1_intro_text
text.text: Seasonal Crop Stress adds soil moisture simulation to every field. Crops need water during key growth stages. If they don't get it, your harvest will be smaller. Irrigation systems let you take control of your field's water supply.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p1_start_text
text.text: Press Shift+M to open the moisture HUD and see all your fields at a glance. Fields shown in red need water urgently. Green fields are in good shape. Press Shift+C to open the Crop Consultant for detailed advice and field risk scores.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p2_how_text
text.text: Rain fills your soil and heat drains it. Every field tracks its own moisture level from 0% (bone dry) to 100% (saturated). The rate of drying depends on the weather, the season, and your soil type.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p2_soil_text
text.text: Sandy soil drains fast and needs frequent irrigation. Clay soil holds water longer but can become waterlogged. Loamy soil is in between and the easiest to manage. Your field's soil type is shown in the HUD and Crop Consultant.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p3_window_text
text.text: Every crop has a period during its growth cycle when it needs water the most. Wheat is most vulnerable in spring, corn suffers during summer heat waves, canola is sensitive in autumn. Low moisture during this window builds up stress on that field.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p3_yield_text
text.text: Accumulated stress reduces your harvest. A small amount of stress means a small yield loss. Severe drought can cut your harvest by up to 60%. The Crop Consultant shows your current yield risk per field so you can prioritise irrigation where it matters most.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p4_hud_text
text.text: Press Shift+M to toggle the moisture HUD. It lists every field with its moisture level, crop type, and stress status. A 5-day forecast shows whether moisture is rising or falling so you can plan ahead.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p4_status_text
text.text: Green means your field is healthy and no action is needed. Yellow is a warning: moisture is dropping and irrigation is advisable soon. Red is critical: the crop is under drought stress and yield loss is already building — irrigate immediately.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p4_keys_text
text.text: Shift+M toggles the moisture HUD on or off. Shift+I opens the Irrigation Manager for a selected system. Shift+C opens the Crop Consultant with a field risk summary and personalised recommendations.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p5_types_text
text.text: Three irrigation types are available in the build menu. Center Pivot covers a large circular area. Drip Line provides precise coverage along a field row. Water Pump powers your irrigation systems and must be placed near a water source first.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p5_schedule_text
text.text: Select an irrigation system and press Shift+I to open its schedule. Pick which days of the week to irrigate and set a daily start and end time. You can also press Irrigate Now in the dialog to water the covered fields immediately without waiting for the schedule.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p6_what_text
text.text: Press Shift+C to open the Crop Consultant. It shows your top 5 highest-risk fields ranked by moisture and stress level, along with a plain-language recommendation for the next 24 hours and a 3-day moisture forecast.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p6_act_text
text.text: Fields marked CRITICAL need irrigation today to prevent harvest loss. Fields marked WARNING should be irrigated within a day or two. Use the Open Irrigation Manager button inside the Consultant to quickly schedule water for the worst field.

text.name: helpLine_cs_p6_npc_text
text.text: If FS25_NPCFavor is installed, Alex Chen will appear as an Agronomist NPC. Build your relationship with Alex through favors to unlock early drought warnings and access specialist irrigation advice.
